title: Create Thank You Page
assignees: Bogdan Zakharchyshyn, Den, Evgenii Gusarovskii, Jordan, Predrag
description:
Please create a thank you page for ASAP Commercial Doors for their social campaign landing page. 

  • URL for the New Thank You page:
    https://asapcommercialdoors.com/commercial-door-repair-service-lp-thank-you/

  • Thank You Page to duplicate (Use the same layout and copy):
    https://asapcommercialdoors.com/thank-you/

  • Trigger for Thank you Page: Upon submitting the Booking form, from this landing page: https://asapcommercialdoors.com/commercial-door-repair-service-lp/

Pixel: Please ensure the attached pixel is placed on the page. 
https://asapcommercialdoors.com/commercial-door-repair-service-lp/


Related discussion thread: https://3.basecamp.com/4226914/buckets/46000874/todos/9792866398



_______________________________________________________________________________________
 

The Client's Goal (Notes from related discussion post)

 

  •  The client wants a new Thank You page so that they can track potential customers who come to their social campaign landing page from Meta Ads. 

  • The client want us to add the Meta Ads pixel to their landing page so they can track the source of form submissions.

  • The client does not want to use the already existing Thank You page because it was created for a different campaign.

 

What We Need to Do


  •  Add the attached pixel to the landing page.

  • Create a Thank You Page for this social campaign landing page:  https://asapcommercialdoors.com/commercial-door-repair-service-lp/

  • Create the new Thank You page by duplicating this old one: https://asapcommercialdoors.com/thank-you/  

  • Use this URL for the new Thank You page:
    https://asapcommercialdoors.com/commercial-door-repair-service-lp-thank-you/

  • Add a Trigger for Thank you Page. Users should be taken to the new Thank You Page after clicking submit on the booking form on the landing page.



Duplicate the already existing Thank you page. 


The new Thank You Page should have the same layout and words as the old one.

Add a trigger to the Booking form, so users are taken to the new Thank You Page after submitting the Form.




After users click the "Schedule Now" buttons on the social media landing page, they are taken to a booking form (which is the contact us page).

 


We need to add a trigger / link to the new thank you page, so users are automatically taken to it after they click the "Send Message" button the booking form.

title: GBP Phone Number Situation
description:
Hey ,

We have another situation here: we need to figure out the GBP phone numbers to ensure NAPW consistency as we improve the site's footer structure to add all locations and set up citations.

The site lists only two locations in the footer, both with phone numbers that are not associated with their GBPs, so not sure what these are either.


Can you please communicate with the appropriate contact:
- Confirm if the current phone numbers on each GBP are their respective unique local numbers.
- If not, get us a list of the correct local numbers to use for NAPW consistency across GBP (secondary if GBP tracking exists), site NAP in footer and respective location pages, Citations.

To not further delay the footer updates, as these are critical SEO elements that need to be addressed ASAP, we will proceed with using each of the GBPs' primary phone numbers in the site footer. But we can change this if needs be once the client gets back to us.

Phoenix
Number on Site in Footer - (833) 373-8761
GBP Primary - (833) 299-3888
GBP Secondary - n/a

Mooresville
Number on Site in Footer -  (980) 351-9710
GBP Primary - (980) 294-0324
GBP Secondary -  n/a

Gilbert AZ
Number on Site in Footer - n/a
GBP Primary - (480) 442-8918
GBP Secondary -  n/a

Charlotte
Number on Site in Footer - n/a 
GBP Primary - (980) 202-3660 
GBP Secondary -  n/a

title: Pin Parrot
assignees: Bogdan Zakharchyshyn, Corey V, Keith Bruss, Mubeen Dildar-Mia
description:
Hi Guys!

What's your recommendation on the client keeping PinParrot for the site? She says, the service says it's improved her GBP visibility, but she really has no way of knowing and its a cost that she's happy to part ways with, as it's a cost associated with each location, if we don't need it to support her GBP's.

title: 24 hours for GBP
assignees: Mikey King, Mubeen Dildar-Mia, Mvelo Nsibanyoni
description:
The client wants to know if it would be helpful to switch their GBP hours to reflect 24 hours.

They do not have LSA's and they are going to soon have Evoca AI answering calls for rollover calls and after hour calls. They can book, but they can't send a tech out.

title: Thank you page
description:
hi!

Client Outcome:
The client is requesting a thank you page be created for better attribution post submissions from this landing page's form. This landing page is for meta ads.

I see that we have this thank you page already for the site.  https://asapcommercialdoors.com/thank-you/
Could we duplicate it and potentially update the copy if the client requests specific copy? 

Here's the original mention:
"I previously had our old marketing team create a landing page that I can use for meta ads. However, I wanted to see if we can add a thank you page after someone fills out the form so I can better track the lead. 

Here is the link to the page I am referring to: https://asapcommercialdoors.com/commercial-door-repair-service-lp/"

Let me know, thank you!

title: Items to be Addressed
description:
Hey ,

I have found a few issues with this client, and Clayton wanted me to list them out to you here so they are on your radar, and hash them out with the right people to get these things addressed.

I am listing the things I have found so far through our GBP audits, and after digging into why the client is stating Charlotte GBP has been pending verification for over 3 weeks now. (Which I think will more than likely turn into a suspension due to missing local signals and such)

Issues found so far:


Charlotte GBP -
- Currently using the homepage is currently only optimized for AZ not NC
FIXED - Updated GBP to use Charlotte lander
- no hours listed
FIXED - Added 7:30am to 5pm as site states
- Mooresville GBP has Charlotte listed in it's service area
FIXED - removed from Mooresville service areas and added to Charlotte

Footer -
Not all locations NAPW exist in footer
Task Created to Implement this - Footer Updates - J404 ASAP Commercial Doors

Phoenix Lander -
Another page exists for this location, but the GBP is currently using - https://asapcommercialdoors.com/service-areas/phoenix-az-2/
The other page is https://asapcommercialdoors.com/service-areas/phoenix-az/

Location Pages -
Location pages do not contain any local signals of NAPW and map embeds on them

title: Charlotte GBP - still in verification limbo
description:
,

and - ASAP's Charlotte GBP has been in verification now for close to 2 months. Is there anything we can have her try or any contacts we could check in with to see what could get it moving.
